instruction: Generate a CARLA scenario JSON based on this description:
input: Test autonomous emergency braking when driving directly into sunset glare at high speed and vehicles ahead suddenly brake due to sun blindness. Include a fast-approaching motorcycle from behind that weaves through traffic, challenging both forward collision warning and blind spot monitoring in extreme lighting conditions.

instruction: Generate a CARLA scenario JSON based on this description:
input: Large delivery truck performs slow cut-in maneuver in urban traffic. The ego vehicle drives at 12 m/s in urban conditions when a gray European HGV truck is positioned ahead in the adjacent lane. After 2 seconds, the truck applies brakes with 0.3 force over 2 seconds. When the ego vehicle's speed drops below 10 m/s, the truck changes lanes into the ego's lane with linear dynamics over 4 seconds, demonstrating a typical slow cut-in by large commercial vehicles in urban environments.

instruction: Generate a CARLA scenario JSON based on this description:
input: During a severe thunderstorm, a car ahead suddenly swerves to avoid a falling tree branch while an oncoming truck also brakes, creating a hazardous situation with limited visibility from heavy rain.

instruction: Generate a CARLA scenario JSON based on this description:

instruction: Convert this natural language description into a CARLA scenario JSON:
input: Conservative lane change sequence at night with reduced visibility. A dark Tesla Model 3 behind the ego in the same lane cautiously accelerates to 15 m/s at 2.5 seconds. At 6 seconds, it changes to the left lane with careful cubic dynamics over 3.5 seconds. After accelerating to 16 m/s, it returns to the original lane when 35 meters ahead, demonstrating conservative nighttime overtaking with multiple lane changes.

When within 22 meters of the ego vehicle, it performs an aggressive lane change with sinusoidal dynamics over 1.8 seconds, demonstrating typical sports car aggressive driving behavior.
